title: Burbank Criminal Defense Attorneys - Farris Law Firm
metaDescription: Don't let criminal charges ruin your life. The Farris Law Firm in Burbank offers experienced legal defense to fight for your rights.
contentHtml:
The phone call from the police, the knock on the door, or being cuffed – these are moments that can change your life forever. In these critical times, you need more than a lawyer. You need a legal advocate who understands the legal system and can support your defense from start to finish.

At the Farris Law Firm in Burbank, we act as a legal shield against criminal charges in Burbank and across Los Angeles County. Our experienced Burbank criminal defense lawyers has defended thousands of clients and protected their rights, freedom, and future. Call 818-861-0861 to receive top legal representation night or day.

Burbank – Crime Stats

Over 200 crimes are reported monthly in Burbank, and people regularly require legal help in this part of California. The city has a crime index of 17, with 100 considered the safest. Most offenses include theft, with just under 7 percent counted as violent offenses.

How a Burbank Criminal Defense Lawyer Can Help You

Retaining professional legal help can support a better outcome in your case. We can advocate for you by –

  • Protecting your constitutional rights
  • Safeguarding your confidences
  • Providing a defense that is both ethical and progressive

We have been successful in dismissing charges – something that is frequently done when there is a violation of constitutional rights or a lack of evidence.

We offer a personalized defense and believe in ongoing and transparent communications.

Why Choose the Farris Law Firm for Your Criminal Defense?

Charles Farris and his wife, Beatrice, established the Farris Law Firm in 2024 to provide a local and more personal legal approach to clients who needed a criminal legal defense. The Farris Law Firm is known for providing best-in-class legal support in southern California.

The legal team takes on a limited number of cases in the local area so that they can concentrate on each case more personally.

We avoid “attack dog” methods, which can be disadvantageous for clients. Instead, we have established excellent relationships with prosecutors, court staff, and judges.

Charles Farris is a member of the Los Angeles County Bar Association (LACBA) and the San Fernando Valley Bar Association. As an SFVBA panelist, he receives referrals from the community.

Where You Can Find Us

Our office is easy to access in downtown Burbank.

We are located at 300 North Third Street, Suite 116, Burbank, CA 91502. We are committed to practicing locally rather than accepting cases hundreds of miles away.

We’re close to the Griffith Observatory – which is home to a celestial viewing of the stars and close to the famous Hollywood sign. In a place where Hollywood tours are often the norm, we have found our legal home in the San Fernando Valley.

What to Expect at a Consultation

During your consultation, we will discuss:

  • The factors of the case and possible outcomes
  • The fines and penalties you are facing
  • Court costs and legal fees
  • Defense investigation costs
  • Expert witness fees (if needed)
  • Payment plan options
  • Restitution requirements

We Defend a Comprehensive Variety of Cases

The Farris Law Firm offers legal defenses for a wide range of offenses. These offenses include:

Driving under the influence (DUI) (first-time and repeat offenders), including felony DUIs involving injury and commercial drivers

  • Vandalism
  • Drug offenses
  • Theft offenses
  • Violent crimes, such as weapons charges, assault and battery, and domestic violence
  • Traffic offenses
  • Military/judicial diversion

Our clients often face:

  • Jail or prison time
  • Big fines
  • Professional license suspension
  • Immigration consequences
  • Employment difficulties
  • Housing restrictions
  • Damage to personal relationships

We Fight the Prosecution

The criminal justice system is detailed and intimidating, especially when you are facing aggressive prosecutors who have unlimited resources at their disposal. The Burbank District Attorney’s office is known for being tough on crime and often seeks maximum penalties – even for first-time offenders.

What most people don’t know is that prosecutors will file the maximum charges to try to get defendants to take plea deals. Without experienced legal representation, you may take a plea deal that is not in your best interest. You can also miss opportunities to have the evidence suppressed or charges reduced.

What to Do After You’ve Been Charged

Even if you’ve already been arrested or charged, you can still take steps to help your case:

  • Be silent about your case – to anyone, including friends and family
  • Write down everything you remember about your arrest and interactions with police
  • Get and preserve any evidence that will help your case
  • Get the contact information for witnesses
  • Keep all your case paperwork
  • Follow all court orders and appearances exactly
  • Start a case journal to document everything
  • Avoid social media posts that can be used against you

Most importantly, bring all this to the Farris Law Firm in Burbank right away. The sooner we start working on your defense, the better the outcome.

Speak to a Lawyer About Your Case

Contact a criminal defense attorney right away. Your lawyer can ensure the preservation of the evidence and the contact of witnesses while the event is still fresh on their minds. We can review all the factors so you can receive results that will offer the best opportunity to experience a more positive outcome.

The stakes are high in criminal defenses, so it’s imperative to work with an attorney who is experienced in defending clients in both misdemeanor and felony crimes. We can review the factors of your case and craft a customized defense that will support you legally and personally.

Act Now – Call A Burbank Criminal Defense Attorney Now

If you’re facing criminal charges in Burbank, it’s crucial to act fast and seek the help of a skilled criminal defense attorney at the Farris Law Firm. The legal system can be overwhelming, and attempting to handle it on your own can have serious consequences. Don’t let arrest charges ruin your life. Call the Farris Law Firm in Burbank, California, for a free consultation at (818) 861-0861. We’re available 24/7 for emergencies and can often see you in our Burbank office the same day.
